name: ai-shadowboxing
description: AI Shadowboxing is a gamified "first date" training simulator designed to help straight men practice high-stakes interpersonal interactions. Leveraging state-of-the-art native multimodal streaming models (e.g., Gemini 3.1, GPT 5.4, Claude Opus 4.6), the simulator reacts instantly not just to *what* you say, but *how* you say it (vocal pitch, nervous laughter, eye contact, and posture).
